overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk industrial facility, ascending metal stairwells and corridors with dramatic red emergency lighting, transitioning through a bright white storage room to a control room overlooking heavy machinery. Cyberpunk 2077 game footage with high-fidelity industrial aesthetics.

events.description: turns left while ascending the metal stairwell

agents.ego_description: climbing metal stairs in a dimly lit industrial stairwell with red indicator lights

entered.detail: metal grating stairs with orange railings ascending through the facility
long industrial light fixture mounted on the ceiling
orange safety railing along the stairwell edge
dark industrial concrete wall with weathered texture

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent through a narrow industrial stairwell. Metal grating stairs with orange safety railings dominate the view, illuminated by sparse fluorescent lighting and red indicator lights. The environment is enclosed and utilitarian, with concrete walls and industrial piping visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with large ventilation ducts

events.description: ambient lighting shifts from dark red to bright teal and white as approaching the storage room entrance

agents.ego_description: moving along an elevated metal catwalk with large industrial ventilation ducts overhead

entered.detail: massive cylindrical metal ventilation pipes running along the ceiling
wall panel emitting red emergency lighting
network of metal pipes and conduits suspended from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving along an elevated industrial walkway, the scene features massive ventilation ducts and piping overhead. The lighting transitions from red emergency tones to cooler teal hues as the camera approaches a brightly lit doorway at the end of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: bright storage room with ventilation equipment

events.description: enters brightly lit storage room from the dark corridor, revealing large ventilation ducts and crates

agents.ego_description: walking through the storage area examining industrial crates and equipment covered in tarps

entered.detail: black industrial crates with white Arasaka corporation logo
tall metal shelving units with various equipment
stacked cardboard boxes on the floor near shelving
large objects covered with gray tarps

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a brightly lit storage room with red floor tiles and massive ventilation ducts running overhead. Arasaka-branded crates, metal shelving, and covered equipment line the walls. The lighting is harsh and clinical, contrasting with the previous red-lit corridor.

events.description: reaches the control console with glass window revealing the lower industrial level with machinery

agents.ego_description: approaching the control console to look out over the large industrial facility below

entered.detail: large curved desk with glowing control panels and holographic displays
large glass window providing view of the lower industrial level
heavy industrial equipment and platforms visible through the window below

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a control room with a large curved console featuring glowing interfaces. Through the glass window, a vast industrial level is visible with heavy machinery, red warning lights, and steam vents. The camera approaches the console to overlook the facility operations below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent through a claustrophobic industrial facility that gradually opens into a vast, high-tech command center. It begins with a climb up narrow metal grating stairs enclosed by concrete walls and red indicator lights, moving upward through a utilitarian stairwell. As the camera reaches an elevated walkway, the red emergency tones shift toward cooler teal hues beneath massive overhead ventilation ducts and piping. The scene then opens into a clinical, brightly lit storage room filled with Arasaka-branded crates and red floor tiles before passing through a final doorway. Finally, the view expands into a control room where the camera approaches a glowing curved console, overlooking a massive industrial level filled with heavy machinery and steam vents through a large glass window.
